epigraph.quote: The campsite smells beautiful of damp vegetation + cows.

moments.quote: The Gondola brought us back. I have never been in such a comfortable, fast, quiet small boat.

images.caption: "Gondola" on Coniston Water, The Lake District
skyline on west side of L. Coniston, slate, bare volcanic
skyline on east side of L. Coniston, limestone, trees

moments.quote: We drove over Wrynose Pass, steep, huge drops, into Wrynose Bottom
We had lunch at the top of steep cliffs next to the fort, looking out at Scarfell Pike.
over a beautiful packhorse bridge with deep cool rock pools on either side.

images.caption: Lake District hills: Great Gable, Kirkfell, Wast Water

moments.place: Wasdale Head, Wast Water, Cumbria, UK
moments.quote: We drove up to Wast Water & walked in the village, seeing St. Olaf's tiny church where climbers are buried & drystode walls of the farm.
an amazing camp site with a meandering stream, bog & field
Coleridge visited + fell in love with Anne, inspite of being married himself, which Wordsworth regarded as an "inconvenience."
There is amazing carved oak furniture in all the rooms - clocks, beds, wainscoats, bookcases.
